sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104868" key="triglofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τριγλοφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n104868.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing mullets,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τ. χιτών</foreign> a net <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for catching them,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.11</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Satyrius</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
